rationale: Re-assert the three per-page/per-container `forall` ensures for both `post1_self_` and `post2_self_` so z3 fires their triggers on each run, then bridge post1↔post2 via the shared `pre_self_` side: set-extensional `=~=` for allocated/mapped/free sets (lifted to the Ghost `@` form det_equal compares), Map-extensional `=~=` for `container_map_4k` (domain equality plus pointwise `get_container_owned_pages` agreement), domain equality for the 2m/1g container maps, and a case-split on `p == target_ptr` to merge the per-page mappings on both runs.
